languages.text: "Мой долг... Моя рукотворная ересь. Я возвысил себя и Нунциуса выше простых составляющих механизма. Каждый винт можно заменить другим, как бы полезен он ни был. Мой долг — заменить винт, счистисть коррозию со своей души. Даже если придется пожертвовать... коллегой. Так велит Омниссия".

"My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."
languages.original_text: "Мой долг... Моя рукотворная ересь. Я возвысил себя и Нунциуса выше простых составляющих механизма. Каждый винт можно заменить другим, как бы полезен он ни был. Мой долг — заменить винт, счистисть коррозию со своей души. Даже если придется пожертвовать... коллегой. Так велит Омниссия".

The Omnissiah commands it."

It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."

languages.text: «Mi deber... es una herejía de cosecha propia. Nos he elevado a Nuncius y a mí por encima de meros componentes de un mecanismo. Cualquier tornillo se puede sustituir por otro, por muy útil que resulte. Mi deber es sustituir el tornillo y purgar la corrosión de mi alma. Aunque deba sacrificar a... un colega. Es la voluntad del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."

traits.locale_text: «Mi deber... es una herejía de cosecha propia. Nos he elevado a Nuncius y a mí por encima de meros componentes de un mecanismo. Cualquier tornillo se puede sustituir por otro, por muy útil que resulte. Mi deber es sustituir el tornillo y purgar la corrosión de mi alma. Aunque deba sacrificar a... un colega. Es la voluntad del Omnissiah».

languages.text: “我的职责……我做出了异端的行径。我将自己与努恩修斯置于了比寻常机件更高的位置。但每颗螺丝都可以被替代，不管它多有用。替换那颗螺丝，剥除我灵魂上的锈蚀，是我的职责。即使我必须牺牲……一位同僚。这是欧姆尼赛亚的命令。”
languages.original_text: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."

traits.locale_text: “我的职责……我做出了异端的行径。我将自己与努恩修斯置于了比寻常机件更高的位置。但每颗螺丝都可以被替代，不管它多有用。替换那颗螺丝，剥除我灵魂上的锈蚀，是我的职责。即使我必须牺牲……一位同僚。这是欧姆尼赛亚的命令。”

languages.text: « Mon devoir... Une hérésie que j'ai moi-même engendrée. J'ai fait l'erreur de nous élever, Nuncius et moi, au-dessus de simples composants d'un mécanisme. Chaque vis, aussi utile soit-elle, est remplaçable. Il est de mon devoir de remplacer la vis, de purger la corrosion de mon âme, même si je dois pour cela sacrifier... un collègue. Telle est la volonté de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."

traits.locale_text: « Mon devoir... Une hérésie que j'ai moi-même engendrée. J'ai fait l'erreur de nous élever, Nuncius et moi, au-dessus de simples composants d'un mécanisme. Chaque vis, aussi utile soit-elle, est remplaçable. Il est de mon devoir de remplacer la vis, de purger la corrosion de mon âme, même si je dois pour cela sacrifier... un collègue. Telle est la volonté de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: "Vazifem... Kendi yarattığım kâfirlik. Kendimi ve Nuncius'u bir mekanizmadaki basit bileşenlerin üzerine çıkardım. Ne kadar faydalı olursa olsun her vida bir başkasıyla değiştirilebilir. Vidayı değiştirmek, ruhumdaki korozyonu temizlemek vazifem. Meslektaşımı... Feda etmem gerekse bile. Hermesih böyle emrediyor."
languages.original_text: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."

traits.locale_text: "Vazifem... Kendi yarattığım kâfirlik. Kendimi ve Nuncius'u bir mekanizmadaki basit bileşenlerin üzerine çıkardım. Ne kadar faydalı olursa olsun her vida bir başkasıyla değiştirilebilir. Vidayı değiştirmek, ruhumdaki korozyonu temizlemek vazifem. Meslektaşımı... Feda etmem gerekse bile. Hermesih böyle emrediyor."

languages.text: "Meine Pflicht ... Von mir selbst begangene Ketzerei. Ich habe mich selbst und Nuncius über bloße Komponenten hinaus zu einem Mechanismus erhoben. Jede Schraube kann durch eine andere ersetzt werden, egal, wie nützlich sie ist. Es ist meine Pflicht, die Schraube zu ersetzen, um die Zersetzung meiner Seele zu beenden. Selbst wenn ich dazu ... einen Kollegen opfern muss. Der Omnissiah verlangt es."
languages.original_text: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Pflicht ... Von mir selbst begangene Ketzerei. Ich habe mich selbst und Nuncius über bloße Komponenten hinaus zu einem Mechanismus erhoben. Jede Schraube kann durch eine andere ersetzt werden, egal, wie nützlich sie ist. Es ist meine Pflicht, die Schraube zu ersetzen, um die Zersetzung meiner Seele zu beenden. Selbst wenn ich dazu ... einen Kollegen opfern muss. Der Omnissiah verlangt es."

languages.text: "私の義務...私自身が作り出した異端。私は自分自身とヌンシウスを 単なる機構の部品より 高めただけだすべてのネジは、それがどんなに有用であろうと、別のものに取り替えることができる。ネジを交換し、私の魂から腐食を浄化することが私の義務だ。たとえ同僚を犠牲にしなければならないとしても。"神のご命令だ"
languages.original_text: "My duty... Heresy of my own making. I have elevated myself and Nuncius above mere components in a mechanism. Every screw can be replaced by another, no matter how useful it may be. It is my duty to replace the screw, to purge the corrosion from my soul. Even if I must sacrifice... a colleague. The Omnissiah commands it."
